key_decisions: Timer state is client-local (AsyncStorage / localStorage) — no server persistence
Auto-start only when carrier is assigned and no timer exists for that load
Claim amount is estimated from billable minutes × $50/hr — mandatory user confirmation
Military time (HH:MM) used throughout per military-time checkpoint
Web + mobile share detentionUtils; platform-specific storage adapters only
